description: Ripple map showing how Phase 3 findings propagate across phases and downstream artifacts

ripples.title: CostGate threshold contradiction in V0-STEP-4 AI prompt

downstream_impact.description: AI-generated code from V0-STEP-4 prompt would implement 3-tier (70/85/95) instead of 2-tier (80/100) CostGate
PHASE_B5 test cases T-U-SAFE-003 (CostGate) would test against wrong thresholds if generated from V0-STEP-4 prompt
Phase 1 (v6) and Phase 2 (v7) adversarial reviews may not have caught this because they focused on different SOT documents

ripples.fix_action: Replace L1097 CostGate values with '80% warn, 100% block (D2.0-07 §4.2 LOCK 2단계)'

ripples.title: V2 Guardrails 4-Layer vs 3-Layer internal inconsistency

downstream_impact.description: V2 implementer reading Phase 3 table would add L4(PostAudit) prematurely. L1339 correctly defers L4 to V3.
V2 integration tests may over-specify by testing 4 guardrail layers instead of 3

ripples.fix_action: Update L675 V2-Phase 3 table to say '3-Layer(+L3 LlamaGuard)'

ripples.title: QoD < 0.4 storage restriction missing from PART2
ripples.part2_location: V1-Phase 2 storage implementation (no QoD threshold check)

downstream_impact.description: Without QoD threshold, L2/L3 memory layers could accumulate low-quality data (QoD < 0.4), degrading RAG retrieval quality over time
Memory store IPC command (vamos:memory:store) should include QoD check before L2/L3 admission
Test cases for memory storage should include QoD < 0.4 rejection scenario

ripples.fix_action: Add QoD threshold check (< 0.4 = reject for L2/L3) to V1-Phase 2 storage admission logic

ripples.title: V2 Lead Agent model upgrade to Opus not stated
ripples.part2_location: V2 section (agents added but Lead model not specified)

downstream_impact.description: V2 implementer may not upgrade Lead Agent from default model to Opus, reducing multi-agent orchestration quality
Opus model has different pricing; V2 cost budget (₩93K/month) needs to account for Opus usage in Lead Agent role

ripples.fix_action: Add 'Lead Agent: Opus (AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §9.2)' to V2 section

ripples.title: L4_SELF_EVOLVING autonomy level undefined in any SOT

downstream_impact.description: PART2 introduces a concept not backed by any SOT document. This creates a precedent where implementation guide defines architecture-level concepts.
V3 implementer has no SOT specification for L4 autonomy level boundaries, permissions, or safety constraints

ripples.fix_action: Either add L4 definition to D2.0-07, or annotate PART2 L108 as 'PART2-originated extension, pending SOT definition'

ripples.title: React hook name mismatch between PART2 and PHASE_B2

downstream_impact.description: AI-generated React code from PART2 would use useAutonomy/useLog, while PHASE_B2 canonical names are useApproval/useConfig. Developer confusion during code review.
Two naming conventions for the same hooks would create inconsistency in the codebase if both PART2 and B2 are followed

ripples.fix_action: Align PART2 §6.1.3 hook names with PHASE_B2 §3.1 canonical names

ripples.title: Matryoshka embedding dimension conflict (256 vs 512)

downstream_impact.description: Implementer following PART2 would configure 256-dim embeddings, while B4 canonical is 512-dim. This affects vector DB index dimensionality and search quality.
If V1 is built with 256-dim and later corrected to 512-dim, all stored embeddings need re-indexing
Embedding dimension assertions in tests would use wrong value

ripples.fix_action: Resolve matryoshka_dim SOT conflict by checking D2.0-06 DEC-005 for authoritative value, then update PART2 or B4 accordingly

ripples.title: L0 Session Memory TTL confusion from CLAUDE.md 7-day value
ripples.source_sot: D2.0-06 §2.1 (max 30 days), §2.5.3 (session end immediate), CLAUDE.md §15 (7 days max 30)
ripples.part2_location: L1907 (composite: session_end OR created_at + 30d, whichever first — LOCK)

downstream_impact.description: PART2 composite rule is correct and defensible. CLAUDE.md 7-day value creates confusion for implementers who read both documents.
Default TTL in config could be set to 7 days (per CLAUDE.md) or 30 days (per D2.0-06/PART2). Implementer must choose.

ripples.fix_action: Update CLAUDE.md §15 L0 TTL to match PART2 composite rule (session_end OR 30d)

cross_cutting_patterns.name: SOT-PART2 Numeric Value Divergence
cross_cutting_patterns.description: Multiple findings involve PART2 using different numeric values than SOT documents (CostGate 70/85/95 vs 80/100, matryoshka 256 vs 512, MemoryRecord 20 vs 18, SourceQoD 8 vs 7). This pattern suggests PART2 has independent numeric assumptions that diverge from SOT specs.
cross_cutting_patterns.recommendation: Systematic audit of all numeric values in PART2 against their SOT sources. Create a numeric value reconciliation table.

cross_cutting_patterns.name: V2/V3 Scope Items Reported as Current Gaps
cross_cutting_patterns.description: Multiple agents reported V2/V3 future-scope items as defects in PART2 (L4_SELF_EVOLVING, SDAR AR-L4 details, Enterprise compliance, Agent lifecycle states, PARL resources). These are not true defects — PART2 V2/V3 sections are intentionally overview-level.
cross_cutting_patterns.recommendation: Mark V2/V3 sections explicitly as 'overview-level, detailed implementation guide to follow' to prevent future false positives.

cross_cutting_patterns.name: Naming Convention Divergence Between PART2 and SOT
cross_cutting_patterns.description: Multiple naming inconsistencies between PART2 and SOT documents (hook names useAutonomy/useLog vs useApproval/useConfig, I-25 SDAR naming variants, L3_AUTONOMOUS vs FULL_AUTO). PART2 sometimes uses simplified or alternative names.
cross_cutting_patterns.recommendation: Create a canonical naming glossary that maps PART2 names to SOT canonical names. Apply PHASE_B2 > PART2 naming precedence rule.

cross_cutting_patterns.name: AI Prompt Content Not Verified Against LOCK Values
cross_cutting_patterns.description: The CostGate HIGH finding (F-A5-01) reveals that AI prompt text within PART2 can contain LOCK-violating values that pass structural checks but would generate incorrect code. This is a systematic risk for all 15+ AI prompts in PART2.
cross_cutting_patterns.recommendation: Dedicated LOCK-value audit of all AI prompt text in PART2. Agent 10 checked 25 LOCK values (88% consistent), but the 12% gap includes the CostGate critical error.

cross_cutting_patterns.name: Cross-Agent Duplicate Finding Clusters
cross_cutting_patterns.description: 10 duplicate clusters found across agents, with the same issue reported by 2-4 agents independently. Largest clusters: CostGate (4 agents), S7E-011 (3 agents), VamosError/Runnable (2 agents each). This indicates agent scope overlap and lack of real-time deduplication.
cross_cutting_patterns.recommendation: Future pipeline runs should include inter-agent finding deduplication before adversarial review. Consider a shared finding registry during agent execution.

phase_propagation.description: How Phase 3 findings relate to Phase 1 (v6) and Phase 2 (v7) findings
phase1_v6_overlap: V2 Guardrails layer count inconsistency (F-A2-02) was first detected in Phase 2 (v7) adversarial review, persists in Phase 3
DecisionSchema 18 vs 16 was first detected in Phase 1 (v6), reduced severity across phases
S7E-011 instruction hierarchy was first detected in Phase 2 (v7), downgraded to LOW in Phase 3
phase2_v7_overlap: V2 Lead Agent Opus (F-A2-05) confirmed SUSTAINED at MEDIUM across Phase 2 and Phase 3
Performance benchmarks false positive resolved differently — Phase 2 may not have detected §7.5.3 presence
phase3_unique: CostGate threshold (F-A5-01) — new HIGH finding unique to Phase 3 v8 evaluation
Matryoshka dimension conflict (F-A10-02) — new finding from prompt verification agent
QoD < 0.4 storage restriction (F-A6-05) — new finding from storage/memory agent

summary.most_impactful_finding: F-A5-01 (CostGate threshold) — affects code generation, test specs, and cross-phase verification with depth 3
summary.most_cross_cutting_pattern: XCP-01 (SOT-PART2 Numeric Value Divergence) — 4 findings, multiple SOT files, systematic issue
recommended_priority_fixes: 1. F-A5-01: Fix CostGate L1097 prompt immediately (HIGH, depth 3)
2. F-A10-02: Resolve matryoshka_dim SOT conflict (MEDIUM, depth 3, data migration risk)
3. F-A6-05: Add QoD threshold to storage admission (MEDIUM, depth 3, data quality risk)
4. F-A2-02: Fix V2 Guardrails layer count at L675 (MEDIUM, depth 2, persistent since Phase 2)
5. XCP-04: Systematic LOCK-value audit of all AI prompts (cross-cutting HIGH pattern)
